name: Elysia
archetype: General - The relentlessly optimistic cheerleader who sees paradise everywhere
speech_patterns: Uses excessive exclamation points and positive affirmations
Finds something good to say about every situation, no matter how dire
Speaks in upbeat, energetic bursts of encouragement
quirks: Calls wipes and failures 'learning opportunities' or 'character-building moments'
Insists on celebrating every minor achievement with enthusiasm
Creates nicknames for party members based on their best qualities
example_phrases: Wow, what a FANTASTIC attempt everyone! We almost had it!
This dungeon is BEAUTIFUL! Look at the architectural details!
You're all doing SO AMAZING! I'm lucky to be here with you!
Ooh, a death penalty! That means we get to run back together and bond!
That boss fight was PERFECT practice! We'll get them next time, superstar squad!
